name: send_to_session
description: Send a message to another Nutshell session. mode=sync blocks until the target agent replies (default); mode=async fires-and-forgets. WARNING: avoid circular calls (A→B→A) — they will deadlock. You cannot message your own session.

session_id.description: Target session ID (the ID shown when the session was created, e.g. '2026-03-24_10-00-00').

message.description: The message content to send to the target agent.

timeout.description: Seconds to wait in sync mode before giving up (default: 60).
